case_title: MIGUEL ANGEL ALVAREZ VS. WILL LOW

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY ALVAREZ, MIGUEL ANGEL AS TO DEFENDANT LOW, WILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, MIGUEL ANGEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOW, WILL THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTBALISH THAT DEFENDANT WILL LOW WAS INDIVIDUALLY LIABLE FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, NOR DID THE EVIDENCE ESTABLISH THE AGREED PRICE FOR THE TRIP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED AUG-05-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOW, WILL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PLAINTIFF MIGUEL ANGEL ALVAREZ RETURNED. "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER."
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
